LanguageData.transcendence.label: <color=#C0C0C0>eternal recreation</color>
LanguageData.transcendence.description:
A transcendence-tech integration matrix keeps cognitive, physical, biological, environmental, psychic, and combat channels active at all times. Linked effects switch with context: adaptive armor hardens as health drops, ranged calibration engages with ranged weapons, and somatic reinforcement resonance unlocks extra close-quarters optimization.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.label: <color=#646464>adaptive armor</color>
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.description:
An adaptive surface armor system that responds to health condition. As health decreases, the armor becomes tougher but restricts movement.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.0.label: adaptive armor (active)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.1.label: adaptive armor (alert)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.2.label: adaptive armor (defensive)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.3.label: adaptive armor (emergency)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.4.label: adaptive armor (fortress)
LanguageData.transcendence_battle_morph_verbs.label: combat protocol
LanguageData.transcendence_battle_morph_verbs.descrip:
A simulated battle-prosthetic action library that grants multiple melee maneuvers: phase cleave, kinetic ram, vector thrust, needle rake, and sweeping kick.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_RangedAdaptation.label: ranged calibration
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_RangedAdaptation.descripti:
Detecting long-range combat tendencies, the adaptive nexus spine continuously calibrates posture, recoil compensation, and visual-motor timing.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_GeneAdaptation.label: somatic reinforcement resonance
LanguageData.EM_NexusSpine_GeneAdaptation.description:
The adaptive nexus spine resonates with strong fast-twitch melee genes and pushes close-quarters biomechanics to a higher output band.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EM_AdaptiveNexusSpine.label: adaptive nexus spine
LanguageData.EM_AdaptiveNexusSpine.description:
This spine permanently distributes physical and biological transcendence channels as its baseline. Linked effects switch by state: adaptive armor below 75% health, combat protocol in combat, ranged calibration with ranged weapons, and somatic reinforcement resonance with strong melee genes.
-- easyrim
